description: The spec defines tagAutocompleteVisibleFor as string | null (section 6.1), which implies only one tag input can be open at a time. However, no edge case addresses what happens when the user clicks the '+' button on FeedRow A, then clicks the '+' button on FeedRow B before closing A's input. Should A's input close automatically? Should B's input be prevented from opening? The current single-value design for tagAutocompleteVisibleFor implies mutual exclusion, but the behavior upon conflict is undefined.

evidence.snippet: tagAutocompleteVisibleFor: string | null; // noteId with open tag input, or null
